svg.text: cicgov — AWS Source Architecture (us-east-1 primary | ap-southeast-2 prod-au)
Delegation set | CAA records | A-alias to APIGW
Regional endpoint | Stage: live | Base path /cicgov → upstream via VPC Link
WAF: AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet + SQLiRuleSet | CloudWatch logs (7 days)
Metrics enabled | Access log: JSON format (requestId, ip, latency, status, etc.)
Shared VPC — Public / Private / Database Subnets (us-east-1 | ap-southeast-2)
EKS Cluster — arm64 Graviton (m6g.large nodes) | HPA | IRSA | network-policies
Image: cicgov:{tag} | Port: 8080 | arch: arm64/linux | Replicas: 1 (current)
CPU req: 0.1 / limit: 1 | Mem req: 1Gi / limit: 2Gi | readOnly rootFS
HPA: min=1 max=4 | CPU avgUtil=75% | PDB: disabled
JAVA_USEPARAMETERSTORE=true → AWS SSM | DD_AGENT_HOST via hostIP
Injected via secretKeyRef into cicgov containers
Lambda Functions (Container-based | Private Subnets | SG: provisioning-lambda-sg)
SQS Queues — 8 total (all KMS CMK encrypted | visibility_timeout | message_retention configured)
PAY_PER_REQUEST | PITR enabled | SSE (KMS CMK: alias/dynamo-db) | deletion_protection=true
PK/SK keys + 10 GSIs (environmentDataSourceId, cutOffDate, retainUntil, retentionCategoryId, etc.) | TTL: timeToLive attr
CMK #1: alias/hy/sns_sqs/cicgov_{env} (SNS + all SQS) | rotation: enabled
CMK #2: alias/{program}/sqs/other-aws-services | CMK #3: alias/dynamo-db | rotation: enabled
IAM / IRSA + SSM Parameter Store (Advanced Tier)
DD tags: business_unit, team, env, hxp.*
